headline: AI Stocks in a Value Fund? This Veteran Money Pro Says Absolutely.
summary: The Patient Opportunity Trust takes a value approach to investing. But one of its fund managers says that doesn’t mean it ignores growth.

headline: Congress Set to Ban Digital Dollar. What It Means for Crypto Stocks.
summary: The central bank digital currency ban has been a longtime goal of conservatives and some advocates in the crypto industry who don’t want the government to issue a cryptocurrency that competes with stablecoins.

raw.headline: Congress Set to Ban Digital Dollar. What It Means for Crypto Stocks.
raw.summary: The central bank digital currency ban has been a longtime goal of conservatives and some advocates in the crypto industry who don’t want the government to issue a cryptocurrency that competes with stablecoins.

headline: Wall Street Lunch: U.S. Authorizes Iranian Oil Sales
summary: Stocks retract, U.S. authorizes Iranian oil sales. Options flashing growing concern and Micron partners with Anthropic.

headline: CLARITY Act Approval Odds Drop To 48%: What Is Going On?
summary: Senate leaders call emergency meetings to save the Clarity Act as two key deals collapse and 2026 passage odds drop to 48% from 74%.

headline: Rep. Dan Meuser: Kevin Warsh has the right plan at the right time
summary: Rep. Dan Meuser, Chairman of the House Financial Services Oversight and Investigations Subcommittee, backed tighter congressional trading rules, praised Kevin Warsh's Fed reforms and expressed optimism on housing legislation.

headline: Crypto Money Floods Maryland Primary — $5.5 Million Backs Steny Hoyer's Handpicked Successor Adrian Boafo
summary: A political action committee aligned with the cryptocurrency industry has donated millions to support Adrian Boafo's candidacy for Maryland's House Democratic primary, according to a report published on Sunday, June 21.

raw.headline: Crypto Money Floods Maryland Primary — $5.5 Million Backs Steny Hoyer's Handpicked Successor Adrian Boafo

headline: Is Tokenization The Next Evolution Of Global Financial Market Infrastructure? Ft. Rob Goldstein, COO Of BlackRock
summary: Financial market infrastructure is often invisible to investors, yet it powers every trade, settlement, and ownership record across capital markets. Read more here.
